The three attack vectors are: (A) CDT Non-Commutativity - spectral dimension deviation from d=4 at Planck scale via lattice simulation; (B) Stochastic Ricci Flow - derive xi from heat kernel first principles to close the Logic Hole; (C) Prime Gap GUE - phi claim RETRACTED.
